description:
Create a new Generic Tool Status for the specified Generic Tool. 
For more information on Generic Tool and Correspondence Tool endpoints, 
see [Working with the Correspondence Tool](/documentation/tutorial-correspondence).

parameters.name: generic_tool_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Generic Tool

is_used.description: Is Used in generic tool item or workflow

status_name.description: The name of the generic tool status.

status.description: The status of the generic tool status.
